title: Junior Javascript & Typescript Engineer
description:
Deine Rolle im Team

  • We build, maintain, and support the customer-facing JavaScript agent that collects web data for Real User Monitoring (RUM).
  • You'll join a highly skilled team that owns the agent end-to-end.
  • As an entry-level engineer, you'll contribute to real features, learn our codebase and practices, and grow quickly through mentorship-working on implementation, testing, performance, and maintainability together as one team.
  • Implement and enhance features in our TypeScript-based web agent with guidance from senior engineers.
  • Improve maintainability, performance, and footprint while keeping compatibility in mind.
  • Write reliable tests (Vitest, Playwright) and use our toolchain (esbuild, ESLint, internal tooling).
  • Participate in design discussions and code reviews; learn how we plan and deliver iteratively.
  • Communicate progress proactively and ask questions early - curiosity is very welcome here.

Unser Angebot

  • We offer attractive compensation packages and stock purchase options with numerous benefits and advantages.
  • Due to legal reasons, we are obliged to list a salary range for this position, which is €46,000 up to €66,000 gross per year based on full-time employment (38.5 h/week).
  • We've listed the salary range for transparency, but if your experience and skills bring unique value, we'd still love to hear from you-please apply even if you're outside the range.

Technologien und Skills

  • Java
  • JavaScript
  • Playwright
  • Terraform
  • Vitest
  • ESLint
  • Kubernetes
  • Esbuild
  • TypeScript
  • Docker

Unsere Erwartungen an dich:

Qualifikationen

  • A strong interest in technology and a willingness to continuously learn new things.
  • Fluent in Java, and open to other programming languages and frameworks.
  • Working knowledge of containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes).
  • Interest in infrastructure-as-code tools like Terraform.
  • Hands-on team player with high quality standards.
  • Curious and innovative mindset with a bias towards action.
  • Solid JS/TS fundamentals.
  • Basic understanding of unit/E2E testing and an interest in browser topics.
  • A clean-code mindset and an eye for performance.
  • Friendly, open communication and willingness to learn quickly.
  • Language: English (German is a plus).

Erfahrung

  • Technical studies related to Computer Science or similar experience.
  • Admin experience (bash scripting, system maintenance) is a plus.
  • HTL graduate or similar background (or equivalent practical experience).
  • Experience with Agile practices and drive continuously improve.

Benefits

  • Team Events
  • Home Office
  • Klimaticket
